description: A regular dodecagonal (12-sided) prism with a circumscribed circle diameter of 35mm and a height of 20mm.
notes: To model a regular dodecagonal prism, construct a 12-sided regular polygon (dodecagon) on the XY plane. The vertices of the polygon should lie on a circle of radius 17.5mm (diameter 35mm). Extrude this polygon along the Z-axis by 20mm. Center the prism at the origin for best symmetry.
